results.title: Anderson Localization in Synthetic Photonic Lattice with Static Random Coupling Disorder
results.snippet: Photonic lattice with random coupling disorder produces Anderson localization of light; localization length scales with disorder strength.

results.title: Anderson localization induced by structural disorder
results.snippet: We demonstrate Anderson localization induced by structural disorder in 3D systems. The localization length tracks disorder strength near the mobility edge.

results.title: Localization and persistent currents in a quasiperiodic disordered helical lattice
results.snippet: Quasiperiodic disorder in a helical lattice yields eigenstate localization with a tunable mobility edge.

results.title: Attention Consistency for LLMs Explanation
results.snippet: We propose a consistency metric for attention maps in LLM explanations and study how attention patterns shift under prompt perturbation.

results.title: Renormalization group for Anderson localization on high-dimensional lattices
results.snippet: Renormalization group analysis of Anderson localization on high-dimensional lattices; computes mobility edge and localization length critical exponents.

results.title: Anderson localization induced by structural disorder
results.snippet: Phys. Rev. B Letter; structural disorder onset of Anderson localization in 3D.

results.title: Transport and Anderson localization in disordered two-dimensional photonic lattices
results.snippet: Direct experimental observation of Anderson localization in disordered 2D photonic lattices, with measured localization length and interference scattering.

results.title: Group velocity distribution and short-pulse dispersion in a disordered transverse Anderson localization optical waveguide
results.snippet: Short-pulse dispersion measurements in a transverse Anderson localization optical waveguide; relates group velocity to localization length.

results.title: Anderson localization induced by structural disorder

results.title: Attention Residuals
results.snippet: AttnRes replaces fixed accumulation with softmax attention over preceding layer outputs; mitigates hidden-state inflation in residual stream.

results.title: Localization and Mobility Edge in One-Dimensional Potentials with Correlated Disorder
results.snippet: Correlated disorder in 1D potentials produces mobility edge despite Mott-Anderson expectation; analytic localization length.

results.title: HAViT: Historical Attention Vision Transformer
results.snippet: Historical attention vision transformer reuses prior attention maps to stabilize features across layers.

results.title: Mobility edge in the three dimensional Anderson model
results.snippet: Numerical localization of eigenstates and mobility edge identification in 3D Anderson model.

results.snippet: Edge-device transformer architectures with local attention windows; reduces parameter count.

results.snippet: Graph attention network for autism spectrum disorder diagnosis from multi-view brain imaging.

results.snippet: Experimental measurement of the mobility edge in 3D Anderson localization with ultracold atoms in disordered potentials.

results.title: Lightweight Transformer Architectures for Edge Devices in Real-Time Applications

results.title: Critical attention scaling in long-context transformers
results.snippet: We identify a critical scaling of attention scores in long-context transformers; rank collapse occurs above a critical context length, analogous to phase transitions.

results.title: Single-Particle Mobility Edge without Disorder
results.snippet: Quasiperiodic single-particle systems exhibit mobility edge in absence of true disorder; localization length analysis.
